problem id: e72155f3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  00000000 -> 00000000
  01001011 -> 11010011
  10100111 -> 11101011
  10110111 -> 11101111
  11010110 -> 10110110
  01000100 -> 00010000
  00100000 -> 00001000
  01001001 -> 01010011
  10001110 -> 10100001
  00110100 -> 00001101

query: 10001001
predicted answer: 01100000
